title: Febreze Air Freshener for Room Spray & Bathroom, Blossom & Breeze, 185ML x 8 Packs, Air Fresheners for Home
features: 1. ODOURCLEAR TECHNOLOGY: Unique Febreze Odourclear technology doesn't just mask but truly fights odours, leaving a fresh scent.
2. VERSATILE AIR FRESHENER: Febreze Spray Air Freshener, non-flammable, and perfect for any room in the house, making it a great choice for air fresheners for home.

3. BLOSSOM AND BREEZE FRAGRANCE: The Blossom and Breeze fragrance of this Febreze bathroom air freshener is inspired by the freshness of delicate soft petals, leaving your home with a beautiful light, fresh scent.
4. HIGH QUALITY FRAGRANCES: Febreze Spray Air Fresheners are available in a wide range of high quality fragrances, enhancing your living spaces.
5. HOME CLEANING SUPPLIES: Febreze is a great addition to your home cleaning supplies, providing a fresh scent to your home.
description: Product Description Febreze Air Freshener with Odourclear technology fights tough lingering odours, leaving a light fresh scent. With 2x the normal odour fighting ingredients, our toughest air freshener with OdourClear technology doesn’t just mask odours, it truly fights them leaving a beautiful fresh scent. Whether you have persistent pet pongs, tough tobacco smells, or other household whiffs that just won’t leave, there’s a Febreze Heavy Duty air freshener for you. Febreze Aerosols are non-flammable and a perfect fit for any room in the house. Try the full range of Febreze products with the unique Odourclear technology, such as Febreze Fabric Refresher and Car Freshener. Also try 3volution Plugs, to continuously fight odours and freshen for up to 90 days Ingredients Water, Alcohol Denat, PEG-60 Hydrogenated Caster Oil, Fragances, Sodium Citrate, Hydroxypropyl clycodextrin, Benzisothiazolinone, Nitrogen Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
